title: Notify a team when it is assigned - Be-spoke text

posts.author: linda.nunes (Linda Nunes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
When a team is assigned to an item, an automatic notification gets to all team members. I would like to change the text of this notification but I don’t think it is possible?
Alternatively, I was thinking of creating a new automation. When Team X is assigned, notify… BUT there are only automations on specific users, not on specific Teams.
Am I missing something?

Thank you
Linda

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @linda.nunes !

Welcome to the monday community!

You are correct, I assume you are using this automation:

image1106×250 22.6 KB

This unfortunately does not support teams as of yet.

I think it is a great idea and that it should also be suggested at the forum as well.

Let me know if I can help in any other way!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
